verses.text: Remaliah' tapa Pekah' kum sawmlesagihna kumin Judah kumpi Jotham' tapa Ahaz in uk ding kipan hi
Ahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnih pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmleguk sung uk hi. A pu David' gamtatnasa bangin a Pasian, Topa' mitah amah a manin gamtalo a
Israel kumpi dangte' khekhap mah zui hi. Topa in Israel mite' mai-ah a hawlkhiat minamte' zat a kihhuai a gamtatte mah uh bangin biakna-in ama tapa nangawn a hal hi
Amah in mualtunga biaknate tung, leh mual dawnte tung, leh singniim nuai khempeuhah biakna pia-in paknamtui a hal hi
Tua ciangin Syria kumpi Rezin leh Israel kumpi, Remaliah' tapa Pekah, Jerusalem a sim dingin hong kuanto uh a, amaute in Ahaz umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin amah zo zolo uh hi
Tua hun laitakin Edom kumpipa in Edom gam dingin Elath la kikin Elath panin Judah gam mite hawlkhia hi. Tua ciangin tuni dongin amaute a ten'na ahi Elath-ah Edom mite hong pai uh hi

Tua ciangin Ahaz in Assiria kumpi Tiglathpileser kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Kei pen na nasempa leh na tapa ka hi hi. Hong kuanto in la, keimah a hong sim Syria kumpipa leh Israel kumpipa kiang panin kei hong honkhia in,” a ci hi
Ahaz in zong Topa' biakinn sung leh kumpipa' vankoihna-a ngun leh khamte la a, Assiria kumpipa tungah letsongin a puak hi
Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in ama thu ngai hi. Assiria kumpipa zong Damaskas a sim dingin hong kuanto-in tua khua la a, a mite galmatin Kir-ah pua a, amah in Rezin a that hi

Assiria kumpi Tiglathpileser tawh a kimu dingin Kumpi Ahaz zong Damaskas-ah a pai ciangin, amah in Damaskas-ah a om biakna tau mu hi. Tua ciangin Kumpi Ahaz in biakna tau a omdan, a neng a tawngin a lahkimna lim khat siampi Urijah kiangah puak hi
Tua ciangin siampi Urijah in biakna tau bawl hi. Damaskas panin Kumpi Ahaz hong tun' ma-in Kumpi Ahaz in Damaskas panin a khakna tawh kizui-in siampi Urijah in na bawl hi
Damaskas panin kumpipa hong tun' ciangin kumpipa in tua biakna tau a en hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in biakna tau hong naihin paito a
a meihal biakna leh an tawh a biakna halin, leenggahzu tawh a biakna sung a, thunuama a biakna sisan biakna tau tungah a theh hi
Tua ciangin amah in ama biakna tau thak leh Topa' biakinn kikalah a om sumngo biakna tau lakhia-in ama biakna tau leilu lampangah a koih hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi Ahaz in siampi Urijah thu pia-in, “Gamsung mi khempeuh' meihal biakna, an tawh a biakna, leh leenggahzu tawh a biakna uh tawh biakna tau lian tungah zingsang meihal biakna, nitakin an tawh biakna, kumpipa' meihal biakna, leh an tawh a biaknate halkhawm in. Tua tungah meihal biakna sisan khempeuh, leh biakpiakna sisan khempeuh theh in. Ahih hangin sumngo biakna tau pen kei-a' dingin thudotna ding hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Kumpi Ahaz' thupiak bangin siampi Urijah in hih thu khempeuh a hih hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi Ahaz in a kingakna kungte tankhia-in tuate panin a kuang lakhia a, a nuai-a om sumngo bawngtalte tung panin tui kuangpi lakhia sukin suang vial tungah a nga hi
Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa a mai-etna dingin amah in Sabbath ni-in zat dingin a sungah a kikoih tutna khuhna leh kumpipa' lutna a puanung, Topa' biakinn panin a lakhia hi
Ahaz in a hih a gamtatna a omlaite, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Ahaz si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Hezekiah in a uk hi.
